description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, on a scheduled cron job, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should run jobs with concurrency control, cancelling previous runs when triggered by pull requests. The jobs should include cmake_installed, bazel_download, cmake_installed_apt, pip, poetry, and file_sync. The file_sync job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.12, and runs a file_sync test.
